title: Managing Your Email
drDigitalIntro: A cluttered inbox is stressful. The key to a clean inbox: delete emails you don't need, archive emails you might need later, and create a routine to check email regularly. Most people check email once or twice a day — not constantly. Your Sent folder keeps a record of every email you've sent, which is useful when you need to remember what you wrote.

steps.say: Open the email from Amazon about your order.
The package arrived. Delete this email — click the Delete button.
The meeting is over. Archive this email to store it safely.
Click Sent in the sidebar to see emails you've sent.

drDigitalSuccess: Your inbox is cleaner now! Delete what you don't need, archive what you might need later.
drDigitalHint: Open an email first, then use the Delete or Archive buttons that appear at the top.
